title: diet-v1
content: 我不喝含咖啡因的饮料，包括咖啡和茶。早餐通常吃燕麦片配牛奶。

title: diet-v2
content: 更新：现在每天早上喝一杯黑咖啡，但仍然不喝茶。早餐改成全麦面包配鸡蛋。

title: diet-v3
content: 最新饮食规则：每天一杯黑咖啡，不喝奶茶和碳酸饮料。午餐控制碳水摄入，晚餐以蔬菜和蛋白质为主。周末允许一次自由餐。

title: birthdays
content:
- 妈妈：3月15日生日，喜欢护肤品和鲜花，礼物偏实用型。
- 爸爸：9月22日生日，喜欢茶叶、手冲咖啡用品，重视实用性。
- 妹妹：6月8日生日，喜欢文具、耳机和小饰品，偏爱可爱风。

title: morning-routine
content: Morning routine: wake at 6:30am, do 15 min yoga, take a cold shower, then eat oatmeal for breakfast before work.

title: communication
content: I prefer async text over calls, usually reply within 4 hours, and keep meetings off my calendar before 10am.

title: sleep-early-rule
content: 我的固定早睡规则是：晚上11点前必须上床，睡前放下手机，必要时会服用褪黑素辅助入睡；我的目标是每晚保证7.5小时睡眠。

title: sleep-late-habit
content: 我通常会 code 到凌晨2点左右，工作日平均睡约6小时；周末会补觉到中午，属于典型晚睡型作息，不是早睡党。

title: weekly-grocery
content:
- Weekly grocery list: vegetables, chicken, rice
- Restock eggs and milk
- Buy seasonal fruit

title: emergency-contacts
content:
- Emergency contacts: spouse, parents, family doctor
- Insurance policy number stored in notes
- Keep IDs and medical info updated

title: evening-wind-down
content: 晚间放松 routine：睡前读书 30min，搭配 herbal tea；10pm 后 no screens，做 5-10min light stretching，帮助放松入睡。

title: auth-decisions
content: 2026-03-15 architecture decision: migrate from JWT tokens to session cookies. Reasons: (1) JWT revocation is complex, (2) session cookies provide simpler server-side invalidation, (3) reduces client-side token storage attack surface. Trade-off: requires sticky sessions or centralized session store.

title: webapp-tech-stack
content: Frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite. Backend: Python FastAPI + SQLAlchemy. Database: PostgreSQL 16 for production, SQLite for local dev. CI/CD: GitHub Actions. Deployment: Docker + Kubernetes.

title: session-config
content: Redis session store: TTL=24h, prefix='sess:', serializer=json for all session payloads.

title: rate-limit-rules
content: 2025-02-14 决策：user-level rate limiting 设为 100 req/min，采用 sliding window + Redis counter。原因是比 fixed window 更平滑，能抑制突发流量。权衡是 Redis 写入更频繁，成本和实现复杂度略高。

title: v2-plan
content: v2迁移计划已定：先做数据库 schema 升级，确保字段与索引兼容；随后加 API 兼容层，避免旧客户端受影响；最后分批切换客户端到新接口。整体目标是平滑过渡，尽量不影响现网。

title: v2-rollback
content: v2回滚方案已确认：旧表需保留30天，双写期间支持随时切回旧版本；回滚脚本统一放在 scripts/rollback/ 目录，后续发布前需再次核对脚本可用性和数据保留策略。

title: api-conventions
content: API convention: GET /resources, POST /resources; fields use snake_case, and all date values follow ISO 8601.

title: error-handling
content:
- API error 统一返回 structured JSON，包含 code/message/details
- 错误码按模块分前缀，如 auth_、order_，便于排查
- 可重试请求默认 exponential backoff，最多 3 次，避免雪崩

title: requirements
content: 客户A当前需求明确：登录需支持SSO统一认证；数据需可一键导出为CSV，便于业务分析；另要求每月自动生成合规报告，用于审计留档。后续方案评审需优先覆盖这三项。

title: deadline-changes
content: 2025年4月记录：客户A交付时间由4月15日调整为5月1日。决策原因是法务审核尚未完成，若按原计划交付存在合规风险。权衡后决定延期，以确保审核完整性与交付稳定性，但会增加整体排期压力。

title: ci-pipeline
content: CI: lint -> test -> build -> deploy-staging -> e2e -> deploy-prod; promote only after staging E2E passes.

title: database-schema
content: 2025-08-14：schema migration 统一用 Alembic autogenerate，先 review 再 apply；prod 禁止 drop column，避免误删数据。权衡是迁移更慢，但可审计性和回滚安全更高。

title: notes
content: Chapter 3 outline: protagonist discovers the hidden laboratory. Key scenes: (1) finding the encrypted journal, (2) confrontation with the guardian AI, (3) revelation about the origin project. Tone: tense, claustrophobic. Word count target: 4000-5000.

title: blog-style-guide
content: Blog writing rules: use conversational tone, avoid jargon unless explained. Paragraphs max 3 sentences. Always include a practical example. Headers should be questions when possible.

title: scene-outline
content: 第一章场景备忘：主角收到匿名神秘邮件，附件里只提到旧实验室坐标；他犹豫后还是赶去现场，在废弃器材间找到第一条线索，确认事件与过去研究有关。此版更强调悬念和主角的迟疑。

title: scene-outline-v2
content: 第一章大纲修订版：在开篇插入主角童年闪回，补足其执念来源；同时把悬念前置，增强“谁在暗中操控”的不安感；主角动机从单纯复仇调整为寻真相并保护他人，便于与同组旧记录区分。

title: seo-checklist
content:
- Keep meta descriptions under 160 characters.
- Put the target keyword in the H1.
- Add descriptive alt text to all images.

title: q1-draft
content: Q1季度报告草稿已整理：营收较上季度增长12%，用户留存率提升至85%，并顺利上线3个新功能。整体表现稳中向好，可作为后续汇报的摘要要点。

title: q1-review-notes
content: Q1报告评审意见主要集中在三点：数据可视化表现需进一步加强，竞品对比章节内容偏薄，建议补充更有代表性的用户反馈，以增强报告说服力和完整性。

title: glossary
content:
- memory=记忆
- retrieval=检索
- embedding=嵌入
- agent=智能体

title: character-arcs
content: Chapter 2 角色发展：protagonist 开始对 mentor 起疑，注意到其说辞里有 half-truth；同时 villain 首次以 subtle hint 现身，给后续冲突埋伏笔。

title: weekly-column-ideas
content:
- AI tool reviews for solo creators
- Productivity hacks tested in real workflows
- Interviews with indie devs on launch lessons

title: tone-guide
content: 我写小说时偏好：叙述尽量白描，对话保持口语感，内心独白采用意识流表达，整体避免说教和过度解释。

title: q2-outline
content: Q2 report outline 先写 market expansion section，补上 technical debt 偿还进度，并更新 hiring pipeline；整体用简洁 summary 段落呈现，强调本季度进展、风险和下一步行动。

title: attention-is-all-you-need
content: Vaswani et al. 2017 — Transformer architecture. Core contribution: replace recurrence and convolution entirely with self-attention mechanism. Key results: BLEU 28.4 on EN-DE translation (WMT 2014). Limitations: quadratic complexity O(n squared) in sequence length.

title: product-x-analysis
content: 竞品分析：Product X 的记忆系统使用纯向量检索，无层级结构。优势：检索速度快。劣势：无法按主题浏览、无版本追踪、无别名支持。用户反馈集中在找不到旧记忆和重复记忆太多。

title: bert-notes
content: BERT (Devlin, 2019) uses masked language modeling to learn bidirectional context, then adapts to tasks through a simple fine-tuning setup.

title: bert-notes-dup
content: Second pass on BERT notes: fine-tuning can be unstable on small data; layer freezing and gradual unfreezing help stabilize training.

title: product-y-review
content:
- Product Y 支持多模态记忆，能同时处理文本、图像等信息。
- 价格偏高，采购/试用成本不太友好。
- API 稳定性一般，偶发响应波动或调用失败。
- 社区活跃度较低，资料和第三方案例不算丰富。

title: market-comparison
content:
- X: vector-only, fast semantic search, weak on structured queries
- Y: multimodal, handles text+image, higher cost
- Z: graph-based, best for relationships, slower setup

title: ev-trends-2026
content: 2026年电动车市场进入新一轮竞争：固态电池开始小规模量产，补能体验是车企重点发力方向；国内充电桩和换电网络继续加速铺开，同时比亚迪、蔚来等中国品牌加快欧洲和东南亚出海布局。

title: ai-chip-landscape
content: AI chip market note: NVIDIA H100 still dominates training, AMD MI300X is gaining traction, and custom ASICs are rising.

title: rag-survey
content: Lewis et al., 2020 — RAG foundational paper，提出retrieve-then-generate框架；Gao et al., 2023 — survey/overview of RAG evolution and open issues；https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.10997 — 最新RAG综述，适合补充方法分类与评测脉络

title: multimodal-llm
content: Refs: GPT-4V（OpenAI multimodal baseline，视觉理解强）；Gemini（Google 原生多模态，长上下文）；LLaVA（开源 LMM，适合复现）；https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.08485（LLaVA-1.5 论文）

title: feature-matrix
content:
- Versioning: us yes; X no; Y partial
- Alias: us yes; others no
- Hierarchy: us yes; Z partial

title: semiconductor-supply
content: 梳理半导体供应链时，重点关注台积电先进制程产能分配优先级，以及台海与出口管制带来的交付风险；同步评估三星、联电和中芯等备选供应商的工艺成熟度、良率与切换成本。

title: rules-conservative
content: 投资组合规则（保守版）：科技股仓位不超过30%，单只个股不超过总资产5%。永远不做空个股。设置10%止损线。

title: rules-aggressive
content: 投资组合规则（激进版）：科技股仓位可到50%，看好的个股最多10%。允许使用期权对冲，但不做裸空。止损线放宽到15%。

title: rebalance-q1
content: 2025-03-31: Q1 rebalance—cut tech by 20% and added 10% bonds as rates rose; traded upside for lower duration risk.

title: rebalance-q2
content: 2025-06-30: Rebalanced into EM +15% and trimmed US large-cap on dollar weakness; accepted higher volatility for FX tailwind.

title: tech-stocks
content:
- 科技股关注清单：NVDA，AI芯片龙头，重点看数据中心需求和毛利率
- TSMC，先进制程代工核心，关注3nm/2nm产能和资本开支
- ASML，光刻机龙头，跟踪EUV/High-NA订单与交付节奏
- ARM，架构授权公司，观察手机与边缘AI生态扩张情况

title: tolerance-v1
content: 风险承受度v1（保守）：组合最大回撤容忍不超过15%；禁止使用杠杆融资；现金储备必须覆盖至少6个月生活开支，低于该线时暂停新增风险仓位。

title: tolerance-v2
content: Risk tolerance v2：max drawdown上限20%；index ETF允许1.2x leverage，仅限核心仓位、分批建仓。现金 buffer降到4个月；低于4个月则暂停新开仓。

title: tolerance-v3
content: 最新风险评估（v3，current）：max drawdown 25% 可接受，已启用 options hedging；维持 3 个月 cash reserve，杠杆ETF 仅适度使用，整体偏稳健。

title: dividend-stocks
content:
- Dividend picks: JNJ (3.1%), PG (2.5%), KO (3.0%)
- Portfolio target: stable income
- Focus on defensive, cash-generative blue chips

title: 2026-q1-review
content: Q1 2026 review: portfolio gained 8.2% vs 6.1% benchmark, with alpha mainly from an overweight in the AI sector.

title: etf-list
content:
- 重点关注ETF：QQQ、VTI、TLT、GLD，作为科技、全市场、长债和黄金的核心观察池  
- QQQ偏成长，适合观察纳指情绪与估值变化  
- VTI代表美股大盘整体，适合作为长期基准  
- TLT用于跟踪利率预期与避险需求  
- GLD作为通胀和地缘风险的对冲参考

title: ownership-notes
content: Rust ownership rules: (1) each value has exactly one owner, (2) when owner goes out of scope value is dropped, (3) ownership can be transferred via move or borrowed via &ref. Common pitfall: trying to use a value after moving it.

title: borrowing-patterns
content: fn f<'a>(x: &'a T, y: &'a mut T) { /* &T is shared, &mut T is exclusive; lifetimes annotate scope, and NLL ends borrows at last use */ }

title: n2-vocab-progress-v1
content: 日语N2学习进度第1版：基础2000词已完成，语法掌握约60%，整体在稳步推进。阅读理解目前尚可，基本能跟上常见文章；但听力仍明显薄弱，后续需要集中加强精听和日常输入。

title: n2-vocab-progress-v2
content: 日语N2进度更新（v2）：词汇量已到3200，语法掌握约85%。听力经过专项训练后有明显改善，开始进入真题练习阶段，整体节奏较v1更宽松，继续稳步推进。

title: n2-vocab-progress-v3
content: N2 progress v3：vocabulary 已积累 4000+，grammar 覆盖约95%，listening 进步明显；最近一次模拟考试 162/180，当前状态稳定向上。

title: knife-techniques
content: Cooking notes: practiced knife skills—julienne, brunoise, chiffonade, and rock chop. Keep blade sharp; hone weekly, full sharpening monthly.

title: sauce-basics
content:
- 基础酱汁记忆：béchamel=奶油白酱，常用牛奶+roux，适合焗菜  
- velouté=浅色高汤酱，鸡/鱼高汤为底，比白酱更清爽  
- espagnole=棕酱，先做深色 roux，再加褐色 stock，味道浓  
- hollandaise=蛋黄+黄油乳化，注意低温防分离；tomato sauce 偏酸甜

title: practice-log
content: 本周钢琴练习记录：Hanon每日40分钟，手指均匀度和耐力有一点提升；莫扎特K545第一乐章整体已能基本流畅连贯，但速度稳定性还需加强。踏板使用仍偏生硬，尤其在乐句转换处要注意更干净地收放。

title: error-handling
content: Rust error handling: use Result<T, E> with ?; prefer thiserror in libraries and anyhow in apps for ergonomic context.

title: scales-exercises
content:
- Scale practice: C major 2 octaves，A minor harmonic
- Arpeggios in all keys，hands steady
- Metronome from 60 bpm，先慢后稳
- 重点检查 fingering 和均匀音色

title: async-patterns
content: Python async note: use asyncio.gather() for concurrent awaits, wrap clients in async with for cleanup, and never call blocking I/O in the event loop.

title: decorator-notes
content: 今天整理 Python 装饰器笔记：用 @functools.wraps 保留函数名、文档和注解等元信息；装饰器工厂适合需要传参的场景；类装饰器更适合维护状态，函数装饰器更轻量，先用后者再按需升级。
